name: Kelsian Group Limited
analysis: KLS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$4.5000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.5000, stop A$4.0887, target A$5.7339 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
